title: How do I determine who created a pulse?
excerpt:
Is there a way to determine who created a pulse within a group?  Is there a way to create a column showing the user who created each item? 
Thanks!

posts.author: Schafir (Michael Schafir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to determine who created a pulse within a group? Is there a way to create a column showing the user who created each item?

Thanks!

posts.author: Lea-monday.com (Léa )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Schafir!
Sure thing.
You can add a “creation log column” on your board and it will add the creator and date of creation for each item automatically!
Hope this helps
Lea

posts.author: Schafir (Michael Schafir)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! I did not see that column option.
